description: Automated reviewer & commenter agent for building-permit plan review. Multi-agent, retrieval-grounded, code-cited.
forbidden: paraphrasing code text from model weights
mutating a record in place after commit
phaseGates: Phase 00 — dev stack green, fixture ingested, title blocks extracted
Phase 01 — sheet index reconciled, PlanIntegrity emits BV comments 1, 4, 8, 9, 18, 24
Phase 02 — schedules parsed, R-value mismatch flagged, BV letter parsed to 58 comments
Phase 03 — measurements with confidence intervals and derivation traces
Phase 04 — Architectural + Accessibility reviewers, first precision/recall numbers
Phase 05 — MEP + Structural + Energy + Fire + CalGreen, 58/58 BV comments covered
Phase 06 — PDF/DOCX letter indistinguishable from BV-authored at a glance
Phase 07 — learning loop live, triage queues populated
Phase 08 — second jurisdiction pack, amendments correctly applied
Phase 09 — measurement v2 + Question-Checklist agent live in designer portal
Finalize — production deploy + runbook + on-call rotation
